task_goal: Delete the file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg from the Android filesystem located in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area.
task_goal_rewrite: The file 2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg is deleted from the Pictures folder within the shared external storage (referenced as sdk_gphone_x86_64) of the Android device.

checkpoints.description: The file "2023_05_12_eager_nurse.jpg" is no longer present in the Pictures folder of the Android device's shared external storage.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or file directory list displaying the contents of the Pictures folder without the specified file name.

checkpoints.description: The Pictures folder accessed during the task is located within the shared external storage originally labeled "sdk_gphone_x86_64" (UI may display an equivalent ABI-specific label such as "sdk_gphone64_arm64").

success_rule: Success is confirmed if both required checkpoints are fully satisfied.
